testsuite.name: com.kraft.book.web.IndexControllerTest

testcase.name: 메인페이지_로딩()

failure.message: java.lang.AssertionError: Expecting actual: "{"timestamp":"2025-08-08T12:30:33.216+00:00","status":500,"error":"Internal Server Error","path":"/"}" to contain: "스프링 부트로 시작하는 웹 서비스"
